message:
chore(audit): batch 536 — deep first-principles review of 7 complex modules

worker_channel (2637L): completion-races-cancel is intentional design
hedge service: all slot acquire/release paths traced, Drop handles cancel
combinator/hedge: race correctness via implicit Drop
circuit_breaker: CallGuard prevents probe leak on panic
once_cell: InitGuard reset on cancel enables retry
redis: transaction cancel-safe (finished flag before await)
bracket: panic safety at every phase, synchronous release in Drop

Additional sweeps: zero take-before-await bugs (only session_types was
affected, already fixed), zero silent error bugs, zero unchecked indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
